title: Alert generation system and method
abstract: In a processing system a method comprises: receiving measurement data; processing the measurement data to create or update at least two models and one or more characteristics associated with each model based on the measurement data. Each of the models is a representation of a real-world thing. The method further comprises processing the characteristics associated with the models to form one or more new relationships between the models when the characteristics are such that two or more of the models are regarded as being related according to one or more relationship criteria; and processing the relationships to generate one or more alerts when one or more of the relationships meet one or more alert criteria.
claims: 1. A method of monitoring hazards performed in a processing system, the method comprising: receiving measurement data, wherein the measurement data is obtained by measuring at least two real-world things, the at least two real-world things including real-world environmental phenomena and real-world assets, the measurement data including a first type of measurement data and a second type of measurement data, the first type of measurement data including environmental data obtained by measuring one or more properties of the real-world environmental phenomena, the second type of measurement data including data obtained by measuring one or more properties of the real-world assets, each of the first and second type of measurement data including location data for a corresponding real-world thing; processing the measurement data to create at least two models, the at least two models including a hazard model and an asset model, the hazard model being created based on the first type of measurement data and the asset model being created based on the second type of measurement data; processing the measurement data to create one or more characteristics associated with each of the at least two models based on the measurement data, wherein the characteristics describe the respective real-world thing and/or its behavior as measured; receiving updated measurement data, wherein the updated measurement data is obtained by a later measurement of the at least two real-world things; processing the updated measurement data to update each of the at least two models and to update the one or more characteristics associated with each model based on the updated measurement data, wherein characteristics of the hazard model that are updated include location and/or extent of the real-world environmental phenomena on which the hazard model is based; providing one or more relationship criteria for testing whether at least two models, which include at least the hazard model and the asset model, are to be regarded as related, wherein the one or more relationship criteria includes a threaten relationship criteria for when a hazard threatens an asset; testing whether the relationship criteria is satisfied for the at least two models by processing the characteristics associated each of the at least two models; based on satisfaction of the relationship criteria, automatically forming one or more relationships between the models that meet the relationship criteria, wherein the one or more relationships between the models have at least one property that is based on the characteristics associated with the models; in response to update(s) to the characteristics associated with the models, dynamically updating at least one property of the one or more relationships between the models; based on the at least one property of the one or more relationships being updated, testing whether an alert criteria is satisfied; and generating one or more alerts based on the satisfaction of the alert criteria.
